ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The padding that should be left around the inside of custom frame panes, in pixels.
ast.target: 自定义框架窗格内部应留出的内边距，以像素为单位。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The display name that this frame should have.
ast.target: 此框架应具有的显示名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL that should be opened in this frame.
ast.target: 应在此框架中打开的 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom Frames is a lot more restricted on mobile devices and doesn't allow for the same types of content to be displayed. If a frame doesn't work as expected on mobile, it can be disabled.
ast.target: 自定义框架在移动设备上受到更多限制，不允许显示相同类型的内容。如果某个框架在移动设备上无法按预期工作，可以将其禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether a button to open this frame should be added to the ribbon.
ast.target: 是否应将打开此框架的按钮添加到功能区。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether this frame should be opened in the unpinned center editor rather than one of the panes on the side. This is useful for sites that don't work well in a narrow view, or sites that don't require a note to be open when viewed.
ast.target: 此框架是否应在未固定的中心编辑器中打开，而不是在侧面的某个窗格中打开。这对于在狭窄视图中无法正常工作的网站，或查看时不需要打开笔记的网站非常有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The zoom that this frame's page should be displayed with, as a percentage.
ast.target: 此框架页面应显示的缩放比例，以百分比表示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please note that Obsidian has to be restarted or reloaded for most of these settings to take effect.
ast.target: 请注意，Obsidian 必须重新启动或重新加载才能使大多数设置生效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The icon that this frame's pane should have. The names of any
ast.target: 此框架窗格应具有的图标。可以使用任何

ast.name: text
ast.source: Whether this frame should use iframes on desktop as opposed to Electron webviews.
ast.target: 此框架在桌面端是否应使用 iframe 而非 Electron webview。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Only enable this setting if the frame is causing issues or frequent crashes. This setting causes all Desktop-only settings to be ignored.
ast.target: 仅当框架导致问题或频繁崩溃时才启用此设置。此设置会导致所有仅限桌面端的设置被忽略。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A snippet of additional CSS that should be applied to this frame.
ast.target: 应应用于此框架的附加 CSS 代码片段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note that this is only applied on Desktop.
ast.target: 请注意，此设置仅在桌面端应用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A snippet of additional JavaScript that should be applied to this frame.
ast.target: 应应用于此框架的附加 JavaScript 代码片段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create a new frame, either from a preset shipped with the plugin, or a custom one that you can edit yourself. Each frame's pane can be opened using the "Custom Frames: Open" command.
ast.target: 创建一个新框架，可以使用插件附带的预设，也可以使用您自己编辑的自定义框架。每个框架的窗格都可以使用“Custom Frames: Open”命令打开。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please be advised that, when adding a site as a custom frame, you potentially expose personal information you enter to other plugins you have installed. For more information, see
ast.target: 请注意，当将网站添加为自定义框架时，您输入的个人信息可能会暴露给您已安装的其他插件。有关更多信息，请参阅

ast.name: text
ast.source: Need help using the plugin? Feel free to join the Discord server!
ast.target: 需要使用插件的帮助吗？欢迎加入 Discord 服务器！

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you like this plugin and want to support its development, you can do so through my website by clicking this fancy image!
ast.target: 如果您喜欢此插件并希望支持其开发，您可以通过我的网站点击此精美图片来支持！
